zh.lifeSummary: 當John Perry於大約1537年出生在英國薩默塞特可福可納時，他的父親William Perry I23歲，母親Elizabeth Coney19歲。他於1562年與Margaret Perry在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年3月7日在英國薩默塞特哈爾享年81歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特哈爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Perry于大约1537年出生在英国薩默塞特可福可納时，他的父亲William Perry I23岁，母亲Elizabeth Coney19岁。他于1562年与Margaret Perry在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年3月7日在英国薩默塞特哈爾享年81岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: Perry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Herry ‘son of Herry’, a variant of the personal name Harry (see Harris ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a pear tree (Middle English piri(e), peri(e), puri(e), Old English pirige, pyrige), or a habitational name for someone who owned or came from a place so named. This surname and a number of variants have been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

variants.name: Peery
meanings: Irish: variant of   Perry  , taken to Ireland at the time of thePlantation of Ulster and in the Cromwellian period.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Peary
meanings: History: Robert E. Peary (1856–1920) was a U.S.-born explorer, who in 1909 led the first successful expedition to the North Pole. Peary Land in the north of Greenland is named after him, as he explored there in 1892 and 1900.

variants.name: Perrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of Perry 2. Alternatively, perhaps from the Old French personal name Pierre; see Pierce .

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Perryman
meanings: English (Devon): elaborated form of Perry , with Middle English man, probably denoting one who lived near a pear tree; see Pearman .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Perry was born about 1537, in Crewkerne, Somerset, England, his father, William Perry I, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Coney, was 19. He married Margaret Perry in 1562, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 March 1617, in Halse, Somerset, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Halse, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Perry est né environ 1537, à Crewkerne, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Perry I, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Coney, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Perry en 1562, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1617, à Halse, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Halse, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Perry um 1537 in Crewkerne, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Perry I 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Coney 19. Er hat 1562 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Perry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. März 1617 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Halse, Somerset, England und wurde in Halse, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Perry è nato il circa 1537 nel Crewkerne, Somerset, England, il suo padre, William Perry I, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Coney, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Perry nel 1562, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 marzo 1617, nel Halse, Somerset, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Halse, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Perryが約1537年にイギリスソメルセトクレウケルンで生まれた時，父William Perry Iは23歳，母Elizabeth Coneyは19歳であった。1562年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Perryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年3月7日にイギリスソメルセトハルゼで81歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトハルゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Perry(이)가 대략 1537년 영국 서머세트 크레w커니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Perry I(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Coney(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1562년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Perry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 3월 7일 영국 서머세트 할스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 할스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Perry nasceu aproximadamente 1537, em Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Perry I, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Coney, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Perry em 1562, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1617, em Halse, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Halse, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Perry родился около 1537 г. в местности крюкирн, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William Perry I было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Coney, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Perry в 1562 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 марта 1617 г. в местности холс, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности холс, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Perry nació aproximadamente 1537, en Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Perry I, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Coney, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Perry en 1562, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1617, en Halse, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Halse, Somerset, Inglaterra.
